recipes.name: Investor Inbox Triage
recipes.description: Classifies inbound founder/investor emails, extracts next actions, and drafts concise replies.

recipes.name: Competitor Signal Scout

recipes.description: Uses 4-tier memory to remember customer corrections, preferences, blockers, and success criteria across support sessions.
